mapper.select: SELECT mg.id AS group_id, mg.code AS group_code, mg.name AS group_name, mg.icon AS group_icon, mg.sort_order AS group_sort_order, mg.use_yn AS group_use_yn, m.id, m.parent_id, m.code, m.name, m.path, m.icon, m.dept, m.description, m.sort_order, m.use_yn, m.visible_yn, m.created_at FROM menu_groups mg LEFT JOIN menus m ON m.group_id = mg.id AND m.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE mg.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY mg.sort_order, m.dept, m.sort_order, m.created_at

SELECT mg.id AS group_id, mg.code AS group_code, mg.name AS group_name, mg.icon AS group_icon, mg.sort_order AS group_sort_order, mg.use_yn AS group_use_yn, m.id, m.parent_id, m.code, m.name, m.path, m.icon, m.dept, m.description, m.sort_order, m.use_yn, m.visible_yn, m.created_at FROM menu_groups mg LEFT JOIN menus m ON m.group_id = mg.id AND m.deleted_at IS NULL AND m.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE mg.deleted_at IS NULL AND mg.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY mg.sort_order, m.dept, m.sort_order, m.created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menu_groups (code, name, icon, sort_order, use_yn) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{icon}, #{sortOrder}, #{useYn}) RETURNING id, code, name, icon, sort_order, use_yn
mapper.update: UPDATE menu_groups SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, icon = #{icon}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL RETURNING id, code, name, icon, sort_order, use_yn
mapper.select: SELECT id, code, name, icon, sort_order, use_yn FROM menu_groups WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY sort_order

SELECT id, group_id, parent_id, code, name, path, icon, dept, description, sort_order, use_yn, visible_yn, created_at FROM menus WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY dept, sort_order, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menus (group_id, parent_id, code, name, path, icon, description, sort_order, use_yn, visible_yn) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{parentId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{path}, #{icon}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{useYn}, #{visibleYn}) RETURNING id, group_id, parent_id, code, name, path, icon, dept, description, sort_order, use_yn, visible_yn, created_at
mapper.update: UPDATE menus SET group_id = #{groupId}, parent_id = #{parentId}, code = #{code}, name = #{name}, path = #{path}, icon = #{icon}, description = #{description}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, use_yn = #{useYn}, visible_yn = #{visibleYn}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL RETURNING id, group_id, parent_id, code, name, path, icon, dept, description, sort_order, use_yn, visible_yn, created_at

WITH RECURSIVE descendants AS ( SELECT id FROM menus WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT m.id FROM menus m INNER JOIN descendants d ON m.parent_id = d.id WHERE m.deleted_at IS NULL ) UPDATE menus SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM descendants)
